thesis: Memory is not storage. Memory is living state governed by evidence, gates and lifecycle.
hypothesis: State-governed memory increases useful chat lifetime, reduces token waste, improves recall and reduces stale-context contamination.

prompt_pairs.pure_condition: Chat keeps full logs, failed attempts, commands and outputs active.
prompt_pairs.casulo_condition: Chat uses current state snapshot plus repo pointers.

prompt_pairs.pure_condition: Chat recalls commits, tags and decisions from heavy accumulated context.
prompt_pairs.casulo_condition: Chat recalls compact state with commit, tag, decision and next gate.

prompt_pairs.pure_condition: Resolved errors and obsolete commands remain active.
prompt_pairs.casulo_condition: Resolved noise is archived or discarded by gate.
Chat resumes from state snapshot and repo evidence.

recommended_next_phase: PROD-2461..2500 - Memory Governor Synthetic Benchmark Dataset
